Path(\"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/prompts/synthesize.md\")\n\n\nclass Urgency(Enum):\n    \"\"\"Result urgency levels.\"\"\"\n    CRITICAL = \"critical\"\n    HIGH = \"high\"\n    NORMAL = \"normal\"\n    LOW = \"low\"\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass SynthesizeRequest:\n    \"\"\"Request to synthesize a fetched intent.\"\"\"\n    intent_id: str\n    intent_type: IntentType\n    utterance: str\n    project_slug: Optional[str] = None\n    fetched_context: Optional[FetchResult] = None\n    urgency: str = \"normal\"\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass SynthesizeResult:\n    \"\"\"Result from synthesize strand.\"\"\"\n    intent_id: str\n    data: dict  # Structured data for component rendering\n    summary: str  # 2-3 sentence narration for audio mode\n    urgency: Urgency\n    coverage: Optional[dict] = None  # Which fetch sources succeeded\n    caveats: Optional[list[str]] = None  # Caveats from fetch failures\n\n\nclass SynthesizeStrand:\n    \"\"\"\n    Synthesize strand: LLM-powered result synthesis.\n\n    Takes fetched context and produces structured results with:\n    - Component-ready data\n    - Conversational summary\n    - Urgency classification\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, prompt_path: Optional[Path] = None):\n        self.prompt_path = prompt_path or SYNTHESIZE_PROMPT_PATH\n        self._zai_client = None\n        self._reload_manager = None\n\n    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client.\"\"\"\n        if self._zai_client is None:\n            self._zai_client = get_zai_client()\n        return self._zai_client\n\n    def _get_reload_manager(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create the hot-reload manager (lazy singleton).\"\"\"\n        if self._reload_manager is None:\n            self._reload_manager = get_reload_manager()\n        return self._reload_manager\n\n    def _load_prompt(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Load synthesize prompt from disk (hot-reload).\"\"\"\n        try:\n            return self.prompt_path.read_text()\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to load synthesize prompt: {e}\")\n            return \"You are a helpful assistant that synthesizes data into structured results.\"\n\n    def _load_urgency_prompt(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Load urgency classification rules from prompts/urgency.md (hot-reload).\n\n        urgency.md is a separately hot-reloadable artifact registered in\n        src/components/hot_reload.py. Returns \"\" on failure so synthesis still\n        functions without urgency guidance.\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            return self._get_reload_manager().get_prompt(\"urgency\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to load urgency prompt: {e}\")\n            return \"\"\n\n    async def synthesize(self, request: SynthesizeRequest) -> SynthesizeResult:\n        \"\"\"\n        Synthesize fetched context into structured result.\n\n        Args:\n            request: SynthesizeRequest with fetched context\n\n        Returns:\n            SynthesizeResult with data, summary, and urgency\n        \"\"\"\n        client = await self._get_zai_client()\n        prompt = self._load_prompt()\n\n        # Splice urgency.md rules into the system prompt (hot-reloadable).\n        urgency_prompt = self._load_urgency_prompt()\n        if urgency_prompt:\n            system_prompt = f\"{prompt}\\n\\n## Urgency Classification Rules\\n\\n{urgency_prompt}\"\n        else:\n            system_prompt = prompt\n\n        # Build user message with intent spec and fetched context\n        user_message = self._build_user_message(request)\n\n        logger.info(f\"Synthesizing intent {request.intent_id}\")\n\n        try:\n            response = await client.call_simple(\n                system_prompt=system_prompt,\n                user_message=user_message,\n                model=ModelClass.HAIKU.value,  # Use Haiku for faster synthesis\n                max_tokens=1024,  # Reduced from 4096 - most outputs are smaller\n                temperature=0.3,  # Lower temperature for more deterministic, faster outputs\n            )\n\n            # Strip markdown code fences and parse JSON (using centralized parser for optimal performance)\n            raw = strip_markdown_fences(response)\n            result_data = json.loads(raw)\n\n            # Extract fields\n            data = result_data.get(\"data\", {})\n            summary = result_data.get(\"summary\", \"\")\n            urgency_str = result_data.get(\"urgency\", request.urgency)\n\n            # Map urgency string to enum\n            try:\n                urgency = Urgency(urgency_str)\n            except ValueError:\n                urgency = Urgency.NORMAL\n\n            # Build coverage and caveats from fetch result\n            coverage = None\n            caveats = None\n            if request.fetched_context:\n                coverage = {\n                    \"total_sources\": request.fetched_context.coverage.total_sources,\n                    \"succeeded\": len(request.fetched_context.coverage.succeeded),\n                    \"timed_out\": len(request.fetched_context.coverage.timed_out),\n                    \"failed\": len(request.fetched_context.coverage.failed),\n                }\n                caveats = request.fetched_context.caveats\n\n            result = SynthesizeResult(\n                intent_id=request.intent_id,\n                data=data,\n                summary=summary,\n                urgency=urgency,\n                coverage=coverage,\n                caveats=caveats,\n            )\n\n            logger.info(\n                f\"Synthesis complete for intent {request.intent_id}: \"\n                f\"{len(data)} data fields, urgency={urgency.value}\"\n            )\n\n            return result\n\n        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to parse synthesize response as JSON: {e}\")\n            # Fallback: return minimal result\n            return SynthesizeResult(\n                intent_id=request.intent_id,\n                data={\"type\": \"error\", \"error\": \"Failed to parse synthesis response\"},\n                summary=\"An error occurred while processing the result.\",\n                urgency=Urgency.NORMAL,\n            )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Synthesis failed for intent {request.intent_id}: {e}\")\n            raise\n\n    def _build_user_message(self, request: SynthesizeRequest) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Build user message for LLM call.\"\"\"\n        lines = [\n            f\"## Intent Specification\",\n            f\"Intent Type: {request.intent_type.value}\",\n            f\"Project: {request.project_slug or 'none'}\",\n            f\"Urgency: {request.urgency}\",\n            f\"\",\n            f\"## Utterance\",\n            f\"{request.utterance}\",\n            f\"\",\n        ]\n\n        if request.fetched_context:\n            lines.append(\"## Fetched Context\")\n\n            # Add results from each source\n            for source, source_result in request.fetched_context.sources.items():\n                lines.append(f\"\\n### {source.value}\")\n                if source_result.status == \"success\":\n                    # Pretty-print the data\n                    lines.append(f\"```json\")\n                    lines.append(json.dumps(source_result.data, indent=2))\n                    lines.append(f\"```\")\n                else:\n                    lines.append(f\"Status: {source_result.status}\")\n                    if source_result.error:\n                        lines.append(f\"Error: {source_result.error}\")\n\n            # Add coverage info\n            if request.fetched_context.caveats:\n                lines.append(f\"\\n## Caveats\")\n                for caveat in request.fetched_context.caveats:\n                    lines.append(f\"- {caveat}\")\n\n        lines.append(f\"\\nPlease synthesize this into a structured result.\")\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n\n\n# Global synthesize strand instance\n_synthesize_strand: Optional[SynthesizeStrand] = None\n\n\ndef get_synthesize_strand(prompt_path: Optional[Path] = None) -> SynthesizeStrand:\n    \"\"\"Get or create the global synthesize strand instance.\"\"\"\n    global _synthesize_strand\n    if _synthesize_strand is None:\n        _synthesize_strand = SynthesizeStrand(prompt_path=prompt_path)\n    return _synthesize_strand\n\n\nasync def synthesize_intent(request: SynthesizeRequest) -> SynthesizeResult:\n    \"\"\"\n    Convenience function to synthesize an intent.\n\n    Args:\n        request: SynthesizeRequest\n\n    Returns:\n        SynthesizeResult\n    \"\"\"\n    strand = get_synthesize_strand()\n    return await strand.synthesize(request)\n","numLines":263,"startLine":1,"totalLines":263}}}

Generate a fallback intent_id for error reporting\n351\t        error_intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n352\t\n353\t        try:\n354\t            # Classify the utterance (one LLM call per utterance — the router stage\n355\t            # is shared across every intent thread it produces, so its duration is\n356\t            # measured once here and stamped onto each RoutedIntent).\n357\t            classify_start = time.monotonic()\n358\t            classifications = await self.classify_utterance(utterance, session_id)\n359\t            router_ms = int((time.monotonic() - classify_start) * 1000)\n360\t\n361\t            routed_intents = []\n362\t            for classification in classifications:\n363\t                # Create intent ID\n364\t                intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n365\t\n366\t                routed_intent = RoutedIntent(\n367\t                    intent_id=intent_id,\n368\t                    classification=classification,\n369\t                    session_id=session_id,\n370\t                    utterance=classification.utterance_fragment,\n371\t                    router_ms=router_ms,\n372\t                )\n373\t                routed_intents.append(routed_intent)\n374\t\n375\t            return routed_intents\n376\t\n377\t        except RouterMalformedError as e:\n378\t            # Malformed JSON after corrective retry - broadcast clarification card\n379\t            logger.error(f\"Router malformed after retry: {e.parse_error}\")\n380\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n381\t            await handler.broadcast_clarification_card(\n382\t                utterance=utterance,\n383\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n384\t                session_id=session_id,\n385\t                parse_error=e.parse_error,\n386\t                retry_count=e.retry_count,\n387\t                raw_output_snippet=e.raw_output[:200] if e.raw_output else None,\n388\t            )\n389\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n390\t\n391\t        except RouterTimeoutError as e:\n392\t            # Router LLM timeout - broadcast router_unavailable\n393\t            logger.error(f\"Router timeout: {e}\")\n394\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n395\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n396\t                utterance=utterance,\n397\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n398\t                session_id=session_id,\n399\t                error_reason=\"timeout\",\n400\t            )\n401\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n402\t\n403\t        except RouterQuotaError as e:\n404\t            # Router quota exhausted - broadcast router_unavailable\n405\t            logger.error(f\"Router quota exhausted: {e}\")\n406\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n407\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n408\t                utterance=utterance,\n409\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n410\t                session_id=session_id,\n411\t                error_reason=\"quota_exhausted\",\n412\t            )\n413\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n414\t\n415\t        except RouterProxyError as e:\n416\t            # Router proxy unreachable - broadcast router_unavailable\n417\t            logger.error(f\"Router proxy error: {e}\")\n418\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n419\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n420\t                utterance=utterance,\n421\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n422\t                session_id=session_id,\n423\t                error_reason=\"proxy_down\",\n424\t            )\n425\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n426\t\n427\t    async def process_intent(\n428\t        self,\n429\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n430\t    ) -> dict:\n431\t        \"\"\"\n432\t        Process a routed intent by dispatching to the appropriate strand.\n433\t\n434\t        Args:\n435\t            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n436\t\n437\t        Returns:\n438\t            Result dictionary with status and data\n439\t        \"\"\"\n440\t        classification = routed_intent.classification\n441\t\n442\t        # Capture per-stage timings for this dispatch and persist one\n443\t        # dispatch_timings row (see Latency Budget & Instrumentation). Each\n444\t        # branch records the stages it measures; router_ms is shared across\n445\t        # the utterance's threads and was stamped on the RoutedIntent. Capture\n446\t        # is non-fatal: a persistence failure logs and moves on, never breaking\n447\t        # the dispatch itself.\n448\t        timings = DispatchTimings()\n449\t        timings.record(\"router_ms\", routed_intent.router_ms)\n450\t\n451\t        # Honesty guards for unimplemented intents\n452\t        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.ACTION:\n453\t            # Action executor is NOT BUILT — broadcast design-only card\n454\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n455\t            await handler.broadcast_action_design_only(\n456\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n457\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n458\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n459\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n460\t            )\n461\t\n462\t            # Update intent status to reflect the design-only state\n463\t            store = await self._get_store()\n464\t            await store.update_intent_status(\n465\t                routed_intent.intent_id,\n466\t                \"resolved\",\n467\t                \"Action execution is design-only — executor not built\",\n468\t            )\n469\t\n470\t            return {\n471\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n472\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n473\t                \"status\": \"design_only\",\n474\t                \"message\": \"Action execution is not yet available\",\n475\t            }\n476\t\n477\t        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.REMINDER:\n478\t            # Reminders are NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — broadcast clarification card\n479\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n480\t            await handler.broadcast_reminder_unavailable(\n481\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n482\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n483\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n484\t            )\n485\t\n486\t            # Update intent status to reflect that reminders are unavailable\n487\t            store = await self._get_store()\n488\t            await store.update_intent_status(\n489\t                routed_intent.intent_id,\n490\t                \"resolved\",\n491\t                \"Reminders are not available yet\",\n492\t            )\n493\t\n494\t            return {\n495\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n496\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n497\t                \"status\": \"unavailable\",\n498\t                \"message\": \"Reminders are not available yet\",\n499\t            }\n500\t\n501\t        try:\n502\t            # For task-profile intents, escalate to bead\n503\t            if classification.intent_type == IntentType.TASK_PROFILE:\n504\t                result = await self._escalate_to_bead(routed_intent, timings)\n505\t            else:\n506\t                # For other intents, fetch then synthesize\n507\t                result = await self._fetch_and_synthesize(routed_intent, timings)\n508\t        except Exception:\n509\t            # Persist whatever was captured before the failure, then re-raise.\n510\t            await self._persist_timings(routed_intent.intent_id, timings)\n511\t            raise\n512\t\n513\t        await self._persist_timings(routed_intent.intent_id, timings)\n514\t        return result\n515\t\n516\t    async def _persist_timings(\n517\t        self,\n518\t        intent_id: str,\n519\t        timings: DispatchTimings,\n520\t    ) -> None:\n521\t        \"\"\"Persist the captured dispatch timings. Non-fatal on error.\"\"\"\n522\t        try:\n523\t            store = await self._get_store()\n524\t            await store.record_dispatch_timings(intent_id, **timings.to_fields())\n525\t        except Exception as e:\n526\t            logger.warning(f\"dispatch timings not recorded for {intent_id}: {e}\")\n527\t\n528\t    async def _fetch_and_synthesize(\n529\t        self,\n530\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n531\t        timings: DispatchTimings,\n532\t    ) -> dict:\n533\t        \"\"\"\n534\t        Fetch context then synthesize into structured result.\n535\t\n536\t        Args:\n537\t            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n538\t            timings: Per-stage timing collector; records fetch_first_source_ms,\n539\t                fetch_total_ms, and synthesize_total_ms.\n540\t\n541\t        Returns:\n542\t            Result dictionary with synthesized data\n543\t        \"\"\"\n544\t        classification = routed_intent.classification\n545\t\n546\t        logger.info(\n547\t            f\"Fetching and synthesizing intent {routed_intent.intent_id} \"\n548\t            f\"(type: {classification.intent_type.value})\"\n549\t        )\n550\t\n551\t        try:\n552\t            # Step 1: Fetch context — resolve project slug to local repo path\n553\t            fetch_intent_type = self._map_intent_type(\n554\t                classification.intent_type,\n555\t                classification.lookup_kind\n556\t            )\n557\t\n558\t            from ..environment.discovery import get_registry\n559\t            from ..registry import get_project\n560\t            repo_path = None\n561\t            ssh_target = None\n562\t            host_alias = None\n563\t            registry = get_registry()\n564\t            if registry and classification.project_slug:\n565\t                entry = registry.lookup(classification.project_slug)\n566\t                if entry:\n567\t                    repo_path = str(entry.path)\n568\t                    ssh_target = entry.ssh_target\n569\t                    host_alias = entry.host\n570\t                    location = entry.display_path\n571\t                    logger.info(f\"Resolved '{classification.project_slug}' → {location}\")\n572\t                else:\n573\t                    logger.info(f\"No repo found for slug '{classification.project_slug}'\")\n574\t\n575\t            # YAML registry entry carries cluster/namespace/argocd_app — cluster\n576\t            # drives ArgoCD endpoint _fetch_argocd_app).\n579\t            project_cfg = (\n580\t                get_project(classification.project_slug)\n581\t                if classification.project_slug else None\n582\t            )\n583\t\n584\t            fetch_request = FetchRequest(\n585\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n586\t                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n587\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n588\t                context=FetchContext(\n589\t                    project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n590\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n591\t                    repo_path=repo_path,\n592\t                    ssh_target=ssh_target,\n593\t                    host_alias=host_alias,\n594\t                    cluster=project_cfg.get(\"cluster\") if project_cfg else None,\n595\t                    namespace=project_cfg.get(\"namespace\") if project_cfg else None,\n596\t                    app_name=project_cfg.get(\"argocd_app\") if project_cfg else None,\n597\t                ),\n598\t            )\n599\t\n600\t            # fetch_first_source_ms = time from fetch start to the first source\n601\t            # resolving (success/fail/timeout — the first progress state on the\n602\t            # pending card). fetch_total_ms = the fetch window close.\n603\t            fetch_start = timings.clock()\n604\t            first_source_at: list[float | None] = [None]\n605\t            total_sources = len(get_fetch_commands(fetch_intent_type))\n606\t            completed_sources: list[int] = [0]\n607\t\n608\t            def _on_fetch_progress(source, result) -> None:\n609\t                \"\"\"Track fetch timing and broadcast progress events to pending card.\"\"\"\n610\t                # Track first source timing for fetch_first_source_ms metric\n611\t                if first_source_at[0] is None:\n612\t                    first_source_at[0] = timings.clock()\n613\t\n614\t                # Increment completed count\n615\t                completed_sources[0] += 1\n616\t\n617\t                # Broadcast progress event to canvas ('3/5 sources in')\n618\t                asyncio.create_task(broadcast_fetch_progress(\n619\t                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n620\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n621\t                    completed=completed_sources[0],\n622\t                    total=total_sources,\n623\t                    source_name=source.value,\n624\t                    source_status=result.status,\n625\t                ))\n626\t\n627\t            fetch_result = await execute_fetch(fetch_request, _on_fetch_progress)\n628\t            timings.record(\"fetch_total_ms\", fetch_result.total_duration_ms)\n629\t            if first_source_at[0] is not None:\n630\t                timings.record(\n631\t                    \"fetch_first_source_ms\",\n632\t                    timings.elapsed_ms(fetch_start, first_source_at[0]),\n633\t                )\n634\t\n635\t            # Check for terminal failure: ALL sources failed (Degraded-State UX)\n636\t            if fetch_result.terminal_failure == \"all_sources_failed\":\n637\t                logger.error(\n638\t                    f\"All fetch sources failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: \"\n639\t                    f\"{len(fetch_result.coverage.failed)} failed, \"\n640\t                    f\"{len(fetch_result.coverage.timed_out)} timed out\"\n641\t                )\n642\t\n643\t                # Build failed sources list for error event\n644\t                failed_sources = []\n645\t                for source, result in fetch_result.sources.items():\n646\t                    failed_sources.append({\n647\t                        \"source\": source.value,\n648\t                        \"status\": result.status,\n649\t                        \"error\": result.error,\n650\t                    })\n651\t\n652\t                # Broadcast all_sources_failed error event\n653\t                handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n654\t                await handler.broadcast_all_sources_failed(\n655\t                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n656\t                    intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n657\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n658\t                    utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n659\t                    failed_sources=failed_sources,\n660\t                )\n661\t\n662\t                # Update intent status to failed\n663\t                store = get_store()\n664\t                await store.update_intent_status(\n665\t                    routed_intent.intent_id,\n666\t                    \"failed\",\n667\t                    \"All fetch sources failed\",\n668\t                )\n669\t\n670\t                return {\n671\t                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n672\t                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n673\t                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n674\t                    \"error\": \"all_sources_failed\",\n675\t                    \"message\": \"No data — all required sources failed\",\n676\t                    \"terminal_failure\": \"all_sources_failed\",\n677\t                }\n678\t\n679\t            # Check for required source failures (terminal condition)\n680\t            required_sources_failed = [\n681\t                s for s in fetch_result.coverage.failed\n682\t                if any(cmd.source == s and cmd.required\n683\t                       for cmd in get_fetch_commands(fetch_result.intent_type))\n684\t            ]\n685\t\n686\t            if sources failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {failure_reason}\")\n689\t\n690\t                # Handle terminal failure\n691\t                await self._handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n692\t                    routed_intent=routed_intent,\n693\t                    failure_reason=failure_reason,\n694\t                    error_type=\"required_source_failure\",\n695\t                )\n696\t\n697\t                return {\n698\t                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n699\t                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n700\t                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n701\t                    \"error\": failure_reason,\n702\t                    \"message\": \"Required sources failed - cannot proceed\",\n703\t                }\n704\t\n705\t            # Step 2: Synthesize result\n706\t            synthesize_request = SynthesizeRequest(\n707\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n708\t                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n709\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n710\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n711\t                fetched_context=fetch_result,\n712\t                urgency=classification.urgency,\n713\t            )\n714\t\n715\t            synth_start = timings.clock()\n716\t            try:\n717\t                synthesize_result = await synthesize_intent(synthesize_request)\n718\t            except Exception as synth_e:\n719\t                # ZAI failure at synthesize stage - broadcast degraded_raw_data\n720\t                # (Degraded-State UX: fetched data is never discarded)\n721\t                logger.error(\n722\t                    f\"Synthesize failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {synth_e}\"\n723\t                )\n724\t\n725\t                handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n726\t                await handler.broadcast_degraded_raw_data(\n727\t                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n728\t                    intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n729\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n730\t                    utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n731\t                    fetched_context=fetch_result,\n732\t                    error_reason=str(synth_e),\n733\t                )\n734\t\n735\t                # Update intent status to failed\n736\t                store = get_store()\n737\t                await )\n742\t\n743\t                return {\n744\t                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n745\t                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n746\t                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n747\t                    \"error\": \"synthesize_failed\",\n748\t                    \"message\": \"Summary unavailable — showing raw fetch data\",\n749\t                    \"degraded\": True,\n750\t                }\n751\t\n752\t            timings.record(\"synthesize_total_ms\", timings.elapsed_ms(synth_start))\n753\t            # synthesize_first_token_ms is not            # Persist result to session store so loadTopics() can display it\n758\t            store = get_store()\n759\t            _topic_type_map = {\n760\t                IntentType.ACTION: \"project\",\n761\t                IntentType.TASK_PROFILE: \"project\",\n762\t            }\n763\t            topic_type = _topic_type_map.get(classification.intent_type, \"research\")\n764\t            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n765\t                label=classification.utterance_fragment or routed_intent.utterance[:80],\n766\t                topic_type=topic_type,\n767\t                project_slugs=[classification.project_slug] if classification.project_slug else [],\n768\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n769\t            )\n770\t            await store.link_intent_to_topic(routed_intent.intent_id, topic_id)\n771\t\n772\t            # Derive result_type from intent classification (includes lookup_kind for lookups)\n773\t            result_type = derive_result_type(\n774\t                intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n775\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n776\t                lookup_kind=classification.lookup_kind,\n777\t            )\n778\t\n779\t            result_id = await store.create_result(\n780\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n781\t                topic_id=topic_id,\n782\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n783\t                summary=synthesize_result.summary,\n784\t                data=synthesize_result.data,\n785\t                urgency=synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n786\t                result_type=result_type,\n787\t            )\n788\t\n789\t            # Render card via hot-path selector (deterministic, no             result_data=synthesize_result.data,\n795\t                summary=synthesize_result.summary,\n796\t                urgency=synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n797\t            )\n798\t\n799\t            # Update result's card_fallback flag so client knows which path to take\n800\t            await store.update_result_card_fallback(result_id, \"data\": synthesize_result.data,\n809\t                \"summary\": synthesize_result.summary,\n810\t                \"urgency\": synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n811\t                \"coverage\": synthesize_result.coverage,\n812\t                \"caveats\": synthesize_result.caveats,\n813\t                \"card_fallback\": render_outcome.card_fallback,\n814\t                \"rendered_html\": render_outcome.rendered_html,\n815\t                \"component_id\": render_outcome.component_id,\n816\t                \"message\": \"Intent synthesized successfully\",\n817\t            }\n818\t\n819\t        except Exception as e:\n820\t            logger.error(f\"Fetch/synthesize failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {e}\")\n821\t\n822\t            # Detect terminal failure and handle appropriately\n823\t            await self._handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n824\t                routed_intent=routed_intent,\n825\t                failure_reason=str(e),\n826\t                error_type=\"worker_crash\",\n827\t            )\n828\t\n829\t            return {\n830\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n831\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n832\t                \"status\": \"failed\",\n833\t                \"error\": str(e),\n834\t                \"message\": \"Fetch/synthesize failed - terminal error\",\n835\t            }\n836\t\n837\t    async def _handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n838\t        self,\n839\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n840\t        failure_reason: str,\n841\t        error_type: str,\n842\t        bead_ref: str | None = None,\n843\t    ) -> None:\n844\t        \"\"\"\n845\t        Handle terminal failure for a routed intent.\n846\t\n847\t        Args:\n848\t            routed_intent: The intent that failed\n849\t            failure_reason: Human-readable failure reason\n850\t            error_type: Type of error (worker_crash, invalid_input, required_source_failure)\n851\t            bead_ref: Associated bead reference (if applicable)\n852\t        \"\"\"\n853\t        from ..escalate.handler import handle_terminal_failure\n854\t\n855\t        # Get or create topic for failed card\n856\t        try:\n857\t            store = await self._get_store()\n858\t            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n859\t                label=f\"Failed: {routed_intent.utterance[:80]}\",\n860\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n861\t                topic_type=\"exception\",\n862\t            )\n863\t        except Exception as e:\n864\t            logger.warning(f\"Failed to create topic for failed card: {e}\")\n865\t            topic_id = None\n866\t\n867\t        # Handle terminal failure (updates intent status, stores in bead_watch, broadcasts SSE)\n868\t        await handle_terminal_failure(\n869\t            intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n870\t            session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n871\t            topic_id=topic_id,\n872\t            failure_reason=failure_reason,\n873\t            error_type=error_type,\n874\t            bead_ref=bead_ref,\n875\t        )\n876\t\n877\t    def _map_intent_type(self, intent_type: IntentType, lookup_kind: str | None = None) -> FetchIntentType:\n878\t        \"\"\"Map router IntentType to fetch IntentType.\n879\t\n880\t        For lookup intents, route to the subtype-specific fetch matrix based on lookup_kind.\n881\t        \"\"\"\n882\t        # Map enum values by string\n883\t        type_map = {\n884\t            IntentType.STATUS: FetchIntentType.STATUS,\n885\t            IntentType.ACTION: FetchIntentType.ACTION,\n886\t            IntentType.BRAINSTORM: FetchIntentType.BRAINSTORM,\n887\t            IntentType.LOOKUP: FetchIntentType.LOOKUP,\n888\t            IntentType.REMINDER: FetchIntentType.REMINDER,\n889\t            IntentType.SELF_MODIFICATION: FetchIntentType.SELF_MODIFICATION,\n890\t            IntentType.MONITORING_CONFIG: FetchIntentType.MONITORING_CONFIG,\n891\t            IntentType.STUCK: FetchIntentType.STUCK,\n892\t        }\n893\t\n894\t        # For lookup intents with lookup_kind, route to the subtype-specific matrix\n895\t        if intent_type == IntentType.LOOKUP and lookup_kind:\n896\t            if lookup_kind == \"logs\":\n897\t                return FetchIntentType.LOOKUP_LOGS\n898\t            elif lookup_kind == \"config\":\n899\t unreachable.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterMalformedError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router returned malformed JSON (after corrective retry).\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parse_error: str, router output (retry {retry_count}): {parse_error}\")\n\n\nclass IntentType(Enum):\n    \"\"\"Intent types that the router can classify.\"\"\"\n    STATUS = \"status\"\n    ACTION = \"action\"\n    BRAINSTORM = \"brainstorm\"\n    LOOKUP = \"lookup\"\n    REMINDER = \"reminder\"\n    SELF_MODIFICATION = \"self-modification\"\n    MONITORING_CONFIG = \"monitoring-config\"\n    TASK_PROFILE =
